title: CrystalCore - Season 3 Modpack
description: The official modpack for CrystalCore, featuring a variety of quality of life client-side mods aswell as decluttered custom menus.
body:
The Official Client-Side Modpack for the Minecraft Server "Crystal Core", a Bedrock Java Roleplay RPG Amalgamation.
Featuring a funky main menu custom made by our development team, this modpack offers the intended experience for the "CrystalCore" Minecraft Server! Other features include:
- awesome quality of life mods!
- a button to directly join the CrystalCore Server!
- superduper cool optimization mods!
- superduperduper unique ui overrides powered by [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)!
- and even more custom game assets and ui overrides made by our team!

Have any questions? Want to know more? Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/ErzdTQRX5X) below and connect with us!
